vocabulary.en: a warning issued by weather services indicating high fire danger
vocabulary.excerpt: many of them recently due to red flag warnings that we've been in that have been from lightning caused.
vocabulary.example_cn: 其中许多是由于我们一直处于的红旗警告状态，由闪电引发。

vocabulary.en: not regular or predictable
vocabulary.excerpt: we're seeing erratic fire behavior due to dry fuels and historic drought conditions.
vocabulary.example_cn: 由于干燥的燃料和历史性的干旱条件，我们看到了不稳定的火灾行为。

vocabulary.en: never done or known before
vocabulary.excerpt: really unprecedented behavior on that fire.
vocabulary.example_cn: 那场火灾的行为确实是史无前例的。

vocabulary.en: able to catch fire and burn easily
vocabulary.excerpt: The fuels are actually combustible at this point.
vocabulary.example_cn: 燃料实际上在这一点上是易燃的。

vocabulary.en: a set of restrictions on activities that could cause fires, such as campfires and fireworks
vocabulary.excerpt: We've been in stage two fire restrictions now.
vocabulary.example_cn: 我们现在处于二级火灾限制状态。

vocabulary.cn: 三位数（指温度超过100华氏度）
vocabulary.en: numbers with three digits, often referring to temperatures above 100°F
vocabulary.excerpt: Other people maybe say going to New York City to celebrate as well. You're also going to have triple digits.
vocabulary.example_cn: 其他人也许说去纽约市庆祝。你也会遇到三位数的高温。

vocabulary.en: people of great importance or power
vocabulary.excerpt: Titans of the music industry will gather Monday to say goodbye to Clive Davis.
vocabulary.example_cn: 音乐界的巨头们将于周一聚集，向克莱夫·戴维斯告别。

vocabulary.en: to reverse a decision or result
vocabulary.excerpt: his murder convictions were overturned on appeal.
vocabulary.example_cn: 他的谋杀定罪在上诉中被推翻。

vocabulary.en: to rise very quickly to a high level
vocabulary.excerpt: disrupting oil production and sending gas prices soaring.
vocabulary.example_cn: 扰乱石油生产，导致汽油价格飙升。

vocabulary.en: to stop or cause to stop
vocabulary.excerpt: maritime traffic in the Strait had essentially halted.
vocabulary.example_cn: 海峡的海上交通基本上已经停止。

vocabulary.en: a phrase or slogan used to unite people in support of a cause
vocabulary.excerpt: the Battle of the Alamo becomes a rallying cry for the Texas Revolution.
vocabulary.example_cn: 阿拉莫战役成为德克萨斯革命的战斗口号。

vocabulary.en: a person from whom one is descended
vocabulary.excerpt: To think that my ancestors were here and fought to build this country.
vocabulary.example_cn: 想到我的祖先曾在这里为建立这个国家而战斗。

sentences.en: It's really the most serious escalation between the U.S. and Iran that we've seen since the two sides signed that memorandum of understanding.
sentences.cn: 这确实是自双方签署谅解备忘录以来我们看到的美伊之间最严重的升级。
sentences.structure: 主系表结构，主语It，系动词is，表语the most serious escalation，后接定语从句that we've seen since...
sentences.analysis: that引导定语从句修饰escalation，since引导时间状语从句。

sentences.en: He said that the Strait of Hormuz could be back to pre-war levels when it comes to the amount of vessels coming through within 30 days.
sentences.cn: 他说，就通过船只数量而言，霍尔木兹海峡可能在30天内恢复到战前水平。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾结构，主语He，谓语said，宾语从句that...，从句中when it comes to...为状语。
sentences.analysis: when it comes to...是固定短语，意为“就……而言”。

sentences.en: There may come a point when we are no longer able to be reasonable, and will be forced to militarily complete the job that we very successfully started.
sentences.cn: 可能会有一个时刻，我们不再能够保持理性，并将被迫以军事方式完成我们非常成功开始的工作。
sentences.structure: There be句型，主语a point，后接when引导的定语从句，从句中and连接两个谓语。
sentences.analysis: when引导定语从句修饰point，that引导定语从句修饰job。

sentences.en: It kicked off this 60-day time period to address some of the big details related to Iran's nuclear program, like the fate of its stockpile of highly enriched uranium, and then other key topics.
sentences.cn: 它启动了这60天的时间段，以解决与伊朗核计划相关的一些重大细节，如其高浓缩铀库存的命运，以及其他关键议题。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾结构，主语It，谓语kicked off，宾语this 60-day time period，后接不定式短语作目的状语。
sentences.analysis: related to...为过去分词短语作定语修饰details。

sentences.en: My fear here, however, is that the logic of tit for tat will lead to unintended escalation and will lead to more risk taking by one side, thinking that they're kind of set in for this new normal, and not really realizing that, oh my goodness, we're in an entirely different world.
sentences.cn: 然而，我担心的是，以牙还牙的逻辑将导致意外升级，并导致一方冒更多风险，认为他们已经适应了这种新常态，而没有真正意识到，哦，天哪，我们处于一个完全不同的世界。
sentences.structure: 主系表结构，主语My fear，系动词is，表语从句that...，从句中and连接两个谓语will lead to，后接现在分词短语thinking...作伴随状语。
sentences.analysis: thinking和realizing为现在分词短语，逻辑主语为one side。

sentences.en: This is an attempt by the United States as well as by Israel, to make sure that any kind of diplomatic agreement, whether that is, you know, pie in the sky normalization or really deconfliction as it relates to the border or much more realistically, an attempt to create security zones as a predicate to withdrawing from Southern Lebanon, whatever that is, is between two governments, not between one government and one terrorist organization.
sentences.cn: 这是美国以及以色列的一次尝试，以确保任何形式的外交协议——无论是遥不可及的正常化，还是与边界相关的真正冲突消除，或者更现实地说，是建立安全区作为从黎巴嫩南部撤军的前提——都是在两国政府之间，而不是在一国政府和一个恐怖组织之间。
sentences.structure: 主系表结构，主语This，系动词is，表语an attempt，后接不定式短语to make sure...，其中that引导宾语从句，从句中插入多个插入语。
sentences.analysis: whether...or...结构列举可能性，as it relates to...为状语从句。

sentences.en: And it speaks to how divided many Americans have been over these events, with some of them arguing that the Trump administration has turned them into partisan spectacles.
sentences.cn: 它说明了许多美国人在这些事件上有多么分裂，其中一些人认为特朗普政府将它们变成了党派奇观。
sentences.structure: 主谓宾结构，主语It，谓语speaks to，宾语从句how divided...，后接with复合结构作伴随状语。
sentences.analysis: with + 宾语 + 现在分词短语，arguing that...为现在分词短语。

sentences.en: The decisions will have sweeping impacts on asylum claims at the border, but also the Trump administration is now able to cancel temporary protections for hundreds of thousands of Haitian and Syrian nationals.
sentences.cn: 这些决定将对边境的庇护申请产生广泛影响，而且特朗普政府现在能够取消对数十万海地和叙利亚国民的临时保护。
sentences.structure: 并列句，由but also连接两个分句。第一个分句主谓宾结构，第二个分句主系表结构。
sentences.analysis: have impacts on...为固定搭配，意为“对……产生影响”。

sentences.en: In just the last few hours, Iran's foreign minister threatened to delay the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz if there are any continued interferences on what he calls Iran's exclusive management of the waterway.
sentences.cn: 就在过去几小时内，伊朗外交部长威胁称，如果对他所谓的伊朗对该水道的独家管理有任何持续干涉，将推迟霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放。
sentences.structure: 主句（Iran's foreign minister threatened to delay the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz）+ 条件状语从句（if there are any continued interferences on...）
sentences.analysis: 该句包含一个条件状语从句，其中'what he calls Iran's exclusive management of the waterway'是介词on的宾语从句。'exclusive management'意为独家管理，体现了伊朗对海峡控制权的强硬立场。

sentences.en: U.S. Central Command said its strikes hit hard Iran's military infrastructure, air defense sites, drone storage facilities.
sentences.cn: 美国中央司令部表示，其打击重创了伊朗的军事基础设施、防空站点和无人机存储设施。
sentences.structure: 主句（U.S. Central Command said）+ 宾语从句（its strikes hit hard Iran's military infrastructure...）
sentences.analysis: 宾语从句中'hit hard'是动词短语，意为'重创'，后接三个并列名词短语作宾语。该句简洁地列举了打击目标，体现了军事行动的针对性。

sentences.en: Iran retaliated for those 10 U.S. strikes by launching missiles and drones against U.S. facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, and Bahrain's government shared these images of the damage to a residential building in that Iranian attack.
sentences.cn: 伊朗针对美国的10次打击进行报复，向美国在巴林和科威特的设施发射导弹和无人机，巴林政府分享了这些伊朗袭击中一栋住宅楼受损的图像。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（Iran retaliated...by launching...）+ 第二分句（Bahrain's government shared...）
sentences.analysis: 第一分句中'by launching...'是方式状语，说明报复的方式。第二分句补充了袭击造成的后果。两个分句通过and连接，展示了事件的因果链条。

sentences.en: But what we are seeing is this the tit-for-tat strikes, really the most serious escalation we have seen since that MOU, the memorandum of understanding, was signed.
sentences.cn: 但我们看到的是这种针锋相对的打击，确实是自谅解备忘录签署以来我们看到的最严重的升级。
sentences.structure: 主语从句（What we are seeing）+ 系动词（is）+ 表语（this the tit-for-tat strikes...）
sentences.analysis: 主语从句'What we are seeing'作主语，表语部分包含同位语'the memorandum of understanding'解释MOU。'tit-for-tat'意为以牙还牙，形象地描述了双方的报复行为。

sentences.en: Now, the key issue at this point is the Strait of Hormuz, I should say, one of the key issues.
sentences.cn: 现在，关键问题在于霍尔木兹海峡，我应该说，是其中一个关键问题。
sentences.structure: 主句（the key issue...is the Strait of Hormuz）+ 插入语（I should say）+ 同位语（one of the key issues）
sentences.analysis: 插入语'I should say'表示说话者的自我修正或强调，同位语进一步说明海峡的重要性。该句体现了口语化的表达方式。

sentences.en: We heard that the security status level is substantial, according to the U.K. Maritime Agency, in the straits at this point.
sentences.cn: 我们听说，根据英国海事局的说法，目前海峡的安全状况级别很高。
sentences.structure: 主句（We heard）+ 宾语从句（that the security status level is substantial...）+ 插入语（according to the U.K. Maritime Agency）
sentences.analysis: 宾语从句中'substantial'意为'重大的、实质性的'，这里指安全级别高。插入语提供了信息来源，增强了报道的权威性。

sentences.en: More than 350,000 people living legally in the United States could be forced to leave after a landmark Supreme Court decision.
sentences.cn: 在最高法院一项具有里程碑意义的裁决之后，超过35万在美国合法居住的人可能被迫离开。
sentences.structure: 主句（More than 350,000 people...could be forced to leave）+ 时间状语（after a landmark Supreme Court decision）
sentences.analysis: 主语部分包含现在分词短语'living legally in the United States'作后置定语。'landmark'意为里程碑式的，强调该裁决的重要性。

sentences.en: On Thursday, the court cleared the way to end temporary protected status, or TPS, for Haitian and Syrian people who have come to America leaving war or instability.
sentences.cn: 周四，法院为结束海地和叙利亚人民的临时保护身份扫清了道路，这些人因战争或动荡来到美国。
sentences.structure: 主句（the court cleared the way to end...）+ 定语从句（who have come to America leaving war or instability）
sentences.analysis: 'cleared the way'意为扫清障碍。定语从句修饰'Haitian and Syrian people'，其中'leaving war or instability'是现在分词短语作原因状语，说明他们离开的原因。

sentences.en: The attorney who argued the Syrian TPS case before the Supreme Court said that this would be, quote, "The largest de-documentization event of people in U.S. history."
sentences.cn: 在最高法院为叙利亚TPS案件辩护的律师表示，这将是，引用原话，“美国历史上最大规模的人员去文件化事件”。
sentences.structure: 主句（The attorney...said）+ 宾语从句（that this would be...）+ 插入语（quote）
sentences.analysis: 主语部分包含定语从句'who argued...'修饰attorney。'quote'表示直接引用，'de-documentization'是生造词，意为取消合法身份，强调该裁决的严重性。

sentences.en: And we are told by employers that removing Haitian TPS holders from the workforce would have a major impact on their employers, on their industries and the economy as a whole.
sentences.cn: 雇主告诉我们，将海地TPS持有者从劳动力中移除将对他们的雇主、行业以及整个经济产生重大影响。
sentences.structure: 主句（we are told by employers）+ 宾语从句（that removing...would have a major impact...）
sentences.analysis: 宾语从句中主语是动名词短语'removing Haitian TPS holders from the workforce'，谓语'would have a major impact'后接三个并列的介词短语'on...'，层层递进地说明影响范围。

sentences.en: The Museum of Mississippi History and the Mississippi Civil Rights Museum together, called Two Mississippi Museums, created a special Mississippi-made exhibit to highlight its own homegrown achievements, like the invention of the household cleaner Pine-Sol and medical advances like the first human lung transplant.
sentences.cn: 密西西比历史博物馆和密西西比民权博物馆合称为“两个密西西比博物馆”，共同创建了一个特别的密西西比制造展览，以突出其本土成就，如家用清洁剂Pine-Sol的发明和首例人类肺移植等医学进步。
sentences.structure: 主句（The Museum...and...created a special exhibit）+ 目的状语（to highlight...）+ 举例（like...and...）
sentences.analysis: 主语部分包含过去分词短语'called Two Mississippi Museums'作同位语。目的状语中'homegrown'意为本土的，举例部分用'like'引出具体成就，使内容更生动。

sentences.en: Mississippi's history is also steeped in racial injustices, and that's also on display, from the Ku Klux Klan robes to a monolith featuring the names of more than 600 victims of racial killings.
sentences.cn: 密西西比州的历史也充满了种族不公，这些也在展览中展示，从三K党长袍到一块刻有600多名种族杀戮受害者名字的巨石。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（Mississippi's history is also steeped in...）+ 第二分句（that's also on display...）
sentences.analysis: 第一分句中'steeped in'意为充满。第二分句中'from...to...'结构列举了展品范围，'featuring'是现在分词作定语修饰monolith，意为以...为特色。

sentences.en: The director of the collection says instructions were simple from the people that they consulted: Just tell the truth.
sentences.cn: 收藏品负责人表示，他们咨询的人给出的指示很简单：只要说出真相。
sentences.structure: 主句（The director...says）+ 宾语从句（instructions were simple...）+ 同位语（Just tell the truth）
sentences.analysis: 宾语从句中包含定语从句'that they consulted'修饰people。冒号后的内容是对'simple'的具体说明，体现了直接引用的效果。

sentences.en: What explains the divergence between the administration federally and trying to maybe downplay some of the racial elements of America's history? And ruby red Mississippi that says we're going to show it all?
sentences.cn: 是什么解释了联邦政府与试图淡化美国历史中种族元素之间的分歧？而深红色的密西西比州却说我们要展示一切？
sentences.structure: 两个疑问句：第一句（What explains the divergence...）+ 第二句（And ruby red Mississippi that says...?）
sentences.analysis: 第一句中'divergence between...and...'结构对比了联邦政府和密西西比州的做法。第二句中'ruby red'比喻政治倾向，'that says...'是定语从句修饰Mississippi，体现了该州与众不同的态度。

sentences.en: But our state government has always been extremely supportive of the Mississippi Department of Archives and History's work, making the two Mississippi museums here.
sentences.cn: 但我们的州政府一直非常支持密西西比档案与历史部的工作，从而建立了这里的两个密西西比博物馆。
sentences.structure: 主句（our state government has always been supportive...）+ 结果状语（making the two Mississippi museums here）
sentences.analysis: 现在分词短语'making...'作结果状语，表示州政府支持的结果。'extremely supportive'体现了州政府的积极态度。

sentences.en: And I think it comes from, you know, we all want Mississippi to grow and learn from our past.
sentences.cn: 我认为这源于，你知道，我们都希望密西西比州成长并从过去中学习。
sentences.structure: 主句（I think）+ 宾语从句（it comes from...）+ 插入语（you know）+ 同位语从句（we all want Mississippi to grow...）
sentences.analysis: 'it comes from'后省略了that，'you know'是口语插入语。同位语从句解释了'it'的具体内容，体现了说话者的解释性语气。

sentences.en: Rescue crews from all over the world are headed to Venezuela to try to save trapped survivors after the earthquake.
sentences.cn: 来自世界各地的救援队正前往委内瑞拉，试图在地震后拯救被困的幸存者。
sentences.structure: 主句（Rescue crews...are headed to Venezuela）+ 目的状语（to try to save trapped survivors after the earthquake）
sentences.analysis: 主语部分包含介词短语'from all over the world'作定语。目的状语中'trapped'是过去分词作定语修饰survivors，意为被困的。

sentences.en: More than three days have passed since the earthquakes and chances of survival dropped rapidly after 72 hours without water.
sentences.cn: 地震已经过去三天多，在没有水的情况下，72小时后生存几率迅速下降。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（More than three days have passed）+ 第二分句（chances of survival dropped rapidly...）
sentences.analysis: 第一分句用现在完成时表示从过去持续到现在。第二分句中'after 72 hours without water'是时间状语，说明了生存几率下降的时间点。

sentences.en: They need silence and they need good conditions in order to listen if somebody is yelling or asking for help.
sentences.cn: 他们需要安静和良好的条件，以便倾听是否有人在呼喊或求救。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（They need silence）+ 第二分句（they need good conditions）+ 目的状语（in order to listen if...）
sentences.analysis: 目的状语中'if'引导宾语从句，作listen的宾语，意为'是否'。该句强调了救援工作对环境的要求。

sentences.en: Other things that we have witnessed is people living in tents waiting for approval to return to their buildings in large residential areas.
sentences.cn: 我们目睹的其他情况是，人们住在帐篷里，等待获准返回大型住宅区的建筑物。
sentences.structure: 主句（Other things...is people living in tents...）+ 定语从句（that we have witnessed）
sentences.analysis: 主语部分包含定语从句'that we have witnessed'。表语部分'people living in tents waiting for approval...'中，'living'和'waiting'都是现在分词作定语，描述人们的状态。

sentences.en: The race to this November's midterm elections heating up in Georgia.
sentences.cn: 今年11月中期选举的竞争在佐治亚州升温。
sentences.structure: 主句（The race...heating up in Georgia）
sentences.analysis: 'heating up'是现在分词短语作谓语，表示正在升温。'to this November's midterm elections'是介词短语作定语修饰race。

sentences.en: Incumbent Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is facing Trump endorsed representative Mike Collins.
sentences.cn: 现任民主党参议员乔恩·奥索夫正面临特朗普支持的众议员迈克·柯林斯的挑战。
sentences.structure: 主句（Incumbent Democrat Senator Jon Ossoff is facing...）
sentences.analysis: 'Incumbent'意为现任的，'Trump endorsed'是复合形容词，意为特朗普支持的。该句简洁地描述了选举对阵双方。

sentences.en: While Americans pay more than they ever have for just about everything, he adorns his office in gold.
sentences.cn: 当美国人为几乎所有东西支付比以往更多的钱时，他却用黄金装饰他的办公室。
sentences.structure: 时间状语从句（While Americans pay more...）+ 主句（he adorns his office in gold）
sentences.analysis: 'While'引导时间状语从句，表示对比。'more than they ever have'是比较结构，意为比以往更多。主句中的'adorns...in gold'形象地描述了奢侈行为。

sentences.en: While cancer patients face down the prospect of losing health coverage, he builds a monument to himself.
sentences.cn: 当癌症患者面临失去医疗保险的前景时，他却为自己建造了一座纪念碑。
sentences.structure: 时间状语从句（While cancer patients face down...）+ 主句（he builds a monument to himself）
sentences.analysis: 'face down'意为勇敢面对，这里带有讽刺意味。'prospect'意为前景。主句中的'monument to himself'批评了自我膨胀的行为。

sentences.en: Three firefighters were killed overnight while battling fast moving wildfires near the Colorado-Utah border.
sentences.cn: 三名消防员在科罗拉多-犹他州边界附近扑救快速蔓延的野火时丧生。
sentences.structure: 主句（Three firefighters were killed）+ 时间状语（while battling fast moving wildfires...）
sentences.analysis: 'while battling...'是省略了主语和be动词的时间状语从句，完整形式为'while they were battling...'。'fast moving'是复合形容词，意为快速移动的。

sentences.en: Some of these areas in Utah have seen little to no precipitation for at least probably 20 to 30 days now.
sentences.cn: 犹他州的一些地区现在至少可能已经有20到30天几乎没有降水了。
sentences.structure: 主句（Some of these areas...have seen little to no precipitation...）
sentences.analysis: 'have seen'是现在完成时，表示持续到现在的状态。'little to no'意为几乎没有，'for at least probably 20 to 30 days'是时间状语，其中'at least probably'体现了不确定性。

sentences.en: It's really like nothing we've ever seen before.
sentences.cn: 这真的像我们以前从未见过的情况。
sentences.structure: 主句（It's really like nothing）+ 定语从句（we've ever seen before）
sentences.analysis: 'nothing'后省略了关系代词that，定语从句修饰nothing。该句表达了情况的极端罕见。

sentences.en: We've got low soil moisture, it's really lined up to be a really severe fire season.
sentences.cn: 土壤湿度低，这真的预示着将是一个非常严重的火灾季节。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（We've got low soil moisture）+ 第二分句（it's really lined up to be...）
sentences.analysis: 第二分句中'lined up to be'意为安排、准备好成为，这里指各种条件已经具备，预示着一个严重的火灾季节。

sentences.en: As other states across the western United States start to see fires, we will be in competition for resources.
sentences.cn: 随着美国西部其他州开始出现火灾，我们将面临资源竞争。
sentences.structure: 时间状语从句（As other states...start to see fires）+ 主句（we will be in competition for resources）
sentences.analysis: 'As'引导时间状语从句，表示伴随情况。'in competition for'意为为...而竞争，体现了资源紧张的局面。

sentences.en: The one-week countdown to July 4th has begun and some Americans are already traveling for the big America 250 celebrations this year.
sentences.cn: 7月4日的一周倒计时已经开始，一些美国人已经开始为今年盛大的美国250周年庆典出行。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（The one-week countdown...has begun）+ 第二分句（some Americans are already traveling...）
sentences.analysis: 第一分句中'countdown to'意为倒计时。第二分句中'big'修饰celebrations，强调庆典的盛大。

sentences.en: As of Saturday, the national average for a gallon of regular gas was $3.88.
sentences.cn: 截至周六，一加仑普通汽油的全国平均价格为3.88美元。
sentences.structure: 主句（the national average...was $3.88）+ 时间状语（As of Saturday）
sentences.analysis: 'As of'意为截至，'national average'是全国平均价格。该句提供了具体的价格数据。

sentences.en: Prices have dropped 58 cents in the last month, but they're still higher than a year ago according to AAA.
sentences.cn: 价格在过去一个月下降了58美分，但根据AAA的数据，仍比一年前高。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（Prices have dropped 58 cents）+ 第二分句（they're still higher...）+ 插入语（according to AAA）
sentences.analysis: 第一分句用现在完成时表示过去一个月的变化。第二分句中'higher than a year ago'是比较结构，插入语提供了信息来源。

sentences.en: The Strait of Hormuz has seen more traffic in the last week than it has in the past three months.
sentences.cn: 霍尔木兹海峡在过去一周的交通量比过去三个月都多。
sentences.structure: 主句（The Strait of Hormuz has seen more traffic...）+ 比较状语（than it has in the past three months）
sentences.analysis: 'has seen'是拟人化用法，意为经历。比较结构'more...than...'突出了交通量的显著增加。

sentences.en: It appeared the U.S. and Iran were close to finalizing a memorandum of understanding, but as tensions escalate with Iran again, there's fear traffic could halt again which could cause gas prices to go up as millions of Americans get ready to travel this week.
sentences.cn: 美国和伊朗似乎接近敲定一份谅解备忘录，但随着与伊朗的紧张局势再次升级，人们担心交通可能再次中断，这可能导致汽油价格上涨，而数百万美国人正准备本周出行。
sentences.structure: 并列句：第一分句（It appeared...）+ 第二分句（but as tensions escalate...there's fear...）+ 定语从句（which could cause...）+ 时间状语（as millions of Americans get ready...）
sentences.analysis: 第一分句中'It appeared'后省略了that。第二分句中'as'引导时间状语从句，'there's fear'后省略了that引导的同位语从句。定语从句'which could cause...'修饰整个主句，时间状语进一步说明了背景。

topics.title: 美伊冲突与临时协议
topics.content: 美国与伊朗在签署临时协议后仍发生交火，伊朗警告干涉霍尔木兹海峡将延迟其重新开放。美国对伊朗军事目标发动打击，伊朗以导弹和无人机报复。双方在谈判中同时进行军事行动，局势紧张。
topics.keywords: 美伊关系, 临时协议, 霍尔木兹海峡, 军事打击, 谈判

topics.title: 委内瑞拉地震救援
topics.content: 委内瑞拉发生两次毁灭性地震，死亡人数超过1400人。国际救援队抵达，包括美国、西班牙等国的团队。救援行动持续进行，黄金救援时间已过，但仍有幸存者被救出。
topics.keywords: 委内瑞拉, 地震, 救援, 死亡人数, 国际援助

topics.title: 美国250周年庆典争议
topics.content: 美国250周年庆典活动在华盛顿国家广场举行，但被批评过于党派化。多个民主党州拒绝参与，音乐艺术家取消演出。同时有对立活动举行，反映美国社会的分裂。
topics.keywords: 美国250周年, 党派分歧, 国家广场, 庆典, 对立活动

topics.title: 欧洲热浪与极端天气
topics.content: 欧洲遭遇历史性热浪，德国出现有记录以来最热的一天和最热的夜晚。基础设施受损，铁路服务受影响。同时美国肯塔基州遭遇严重洪灾，造成人员死亡和财产损失。
topics.keywords: 热浪, 欧洲, 极端天气, 洪灾, 肯塔基

topics.title: 美国移民政策与最高法院裁决
topics.content: 美国最高法院保守派多数支持特朗普政府的移民政策，允许取消对海地和叙利亚国民的临时保护身份，并对边境庇护申请产生广泛影响。
topics.keywords: 移民政策, 最高法院, 临时保护身份, 庇护, 特朗普

topics.title: 美伊冲突与霍尔木兹海峡局势
topics.content: 美国与伊朗之间的临时协议出现裂痕，双方互相指责对方违反谅解备忘录。伊朗威胁推迟重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，要求独家管理权。美国对伊朗军事目标进行打击，伊朗则向巴林和科威特的美国设施发射导弹。霍尔木兹海峡的航运受到严重影响，油价波动。
topics.keywords: 美伊关系, 霍尔木兹海峡, 谅解备忘录, 军事打击, 油价

topics.title: 委内瑞拉地震救援
topics.content: 委内瑞拉遭遇两次强烈地震，死亡人数超过1400人，救援工作持续进行。国际救援队参与搜救，但72小时黄金救援时间已过，幸存者生还几率下降。天气恶劣（降雨）增加了救援难度。
topics.keywords: 委内瑞拉地震, 救援, 黄金救援时间, 幸存者, 国际援助

topics.title: 美国最高法院裁定终止TPS
topics.content: 最高法院裁定可以终止海地和叙利亚难民的临时保护身份（TPS），影响超过35万人。该裁决可能导致大规模驱逐，对劳动力市场和经济产生重大影响，尤其是服务业和养老护理行业。
topics.keywords: TPS, 最高法院, 海地难民, 叙利亚难民, 驱逐, 劳动力

topics.title: 密西西比州历史展览与美国250周年
topics.content: 为庆祝美国250周年，密西西比州的两个博物馆联合举办展览，展示该州的历史成就和种族不公。展览包括三K党长袍和种族杀戮受害者名单，体现了“讲述全部真相”的理念，与联邦政府淡化种族问题的做法形成对比。
topics.keywords: 密西西比州, 美国250周年, 种族不公, 历史展览, 真相

topics.title: 佐治亚州中期选举
topics.content: 佐治亚州参议员选举成为焦点，现任民主党参议员乔恩·奥索夫对阵特朗普支持的共和党众议员迈克·柯林斯。奥索夫批评特朗普的外交政策和经济表现，选举结果可能影响参议院权力平衡。
topics.keywords: 佐治亚州, 中期选举, 参议员, 奥索夫, 柯林斯, 特朗普

topics.title: 美国西部野火
topics.content: 科罗拉多州和犹他州发生多起野火，其中犹他州的Cottonwood火灾已烧毁9.2万英亩，0%受控。三名消防员丧生。干旱、低湿度和强风加剧了火势，犹他州限制独立日烟花燃放。
topics.keywords: 野火, 科罗拉多州, 犹他州, 干旱, 消防员, 烟花禁令

topics.title: 独立日出行与油价
topics.content: AAA预计超过7200万美国人将在独立日期间出行，其中近6200万人驾车。汽油价格近期下跌，全国均价3.88美元/加仑，但仍高于去年同期。霍尔木兹海峡的紧张局势可能影响油价。
topics.keywords: 独立日, 出行, AAA, 油价, 霍尔木兹海峡
